prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. A thin lamp flame throws a narrow warm light across an aged man's sorrowful face and an open parchment, while the background figures and a far cross sink into deep black shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
An aged King David is seated alone at a low table in deep shadow, a feather pen at rest above a half-unrolled parchment of Hebrew, a single small lamp at his side, his lined face heavy with sorrow. In the dim background a forsaken figure kneels with bowed head and a far wooden cross stands on a dark horizon. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the aged man alone at his lamp, the dim forsaken figure and far cross behind.

Cut to mid framing — the sorrowful face and shoulders in the thin lamplight.

Cut to close-up — the lined, grieving face, eyes lowered.

Cut to insert — the feather pen at rest above the parchment.

Cut to insert — the small lamp and its thin flame.

Cut to macro detail — the wet first Hebrew line on the parchment.

Cut to upper framing — the dim far cross on the dark horizon.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the aged man alone at his lamp.

Micro-motion:
- minimal
- lamp flame stirs as painted light only

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Lonely, sober foresight.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image
